zh.Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli-Venezi: 義大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁馬尼亞諾 在 里維埃拉

zh.lifeSummary: 當Matteo Rosso Orsini於1178年出生在義大利時，他的父親Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro34歲，母親Stefania Rubia Orsini23歲。他於1201年與Perna Caetani在義大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁馬尼亞諾 在 里維埃拉結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1246年10月13日在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬享年68歲，埋葬在義大利拉其羅馬羅馬。

zh-hans.Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli-Venezi: 意大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁馬尼亞諾 在 里維埃拉
zh-hans.Ursinis Grande, Comune di Buja, Provinci: 意大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁布亞武爾希尼斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matteo Rosso Orsini于1178年出生在意大利时，他的父亲Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro34岁，母亲Stefania Rubia Orsini23岁。他于1201年与Perna Caetani在意大利福利福利 維其亞 朱莉婭武丁馬尼亞諾 在 里維埃拉结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1246年10月13日在意大利拉其羅馬羅馬享年68岁，埋葬在意大利拉其羅馬羅馬。

nameMeanings.name: Orsini
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Armando, Donato, Orlando, Antonio, Mario, Carmine, Nunzio, Pasquale, Vittorio, Camillo, Dante, Domenic.  Spanish Carlos, Domingo, Jose, Santos, Alejandro, Ana, Anacleto.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Orsino  .

variants.name: Orsino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Orlando, Annunziata, Salvatore.
Italian: from a diminutive of the vocabulary word or a pet form of the personal name   Orso  .

nameMeanings.name: Matteo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

variants.name: Mattia
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

nameMeanings.name: Rosso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either an adoption of the Gaelic topographic term ros ‘headland’ ( compare Glen , Kyle ) or a transferred use of the Scottish surname, which is borne by a large and ancient family whose members have played a major role in Scottish history. Although still very popular in Scotland, the name is now in widespread general use.

en.lifeSummary: When Matteo Rosso Orsini was born in 1178, in Italy, his father, Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro, was 34 and his mother, Stefania Rubia Orsini, was 23. He married Perna Caetani in 1201, in Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italy. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 13 October 1246, in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy, at the age of 68, and was buried in Rome, Roma, Lazio, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matteo Rosso Orsini est né en 1178, à Italie, son père, Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Stefania Rubia Orsini, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Perna Caetani en 1201, à Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1246, à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Roma, Rome, Lazio, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matteo Rosso Orsini 1178 in Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro 34 und seine Mutter Stefania Rubia Orsini 23. Er hat 1201 in Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friaul-Julisch Venetien, Italien Perna Caetani geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1246 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italien und wurde in Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matteo Rosso Orsini è nato il nel 1178 nel Italia, il suo padre, Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Stefania Rubia Orsini, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Perna Caetani nel 1201, nel Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 13 ottobre 1246, nel Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Matteo Rosso Orsiniが1178年にイタリアで生まれた時，父Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaroは34歳，母Stefania Rubia Orsiniは23歳であった。1201年にイタリアフリウリ ベンエズア ギウリアウディンマグナノ イン リヴィエラでPerna Caetaniと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1246年10月13日にイタリアラズオロマロマで68歳で死去し，イタリアラズオロマロマにて埋葬された。

ko.Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli-Venezi: 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 매그나노 인 리비라
ko.Ursinis Grande, Comune di Buja, Provinci: 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 버이아 르시니스
ko.lifeSummary: Matteo Rosso Orsini(이)가 1178년 이탈리아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Stefania Rubia Orsini(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1201년 이탈리아 프리우리 븐지아 주리야 우딘 매그나노 인 리비라에서 Perna Caetani(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1246년 10월 13일 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 라지오 로마 로마에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matteo Rosso Orsini nasceu em 1178, em Itália, seu pai, Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Stefania Rubia Orsini, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Perna Caetani em 1201, em Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1246, em Roma, Roma, Lazio, Itália, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Roma, Roma, Lazio, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matteo Rosso Orsini родился в 1178 г. в местности Италия, его отцу по имени Giangaetano Orsini Lord Of Vicovaro было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Stefania Rubia Orsini, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Perna Caetani в 1201 г. в местности магнано ин ривиира, удаин, фрюли винезя гюля, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 13 октября 1246 г. в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности Рим, рома, лазио, Италия.

Se casó con Perna Caetani en 1201, en Magnano in Riviera, Udine, Friuli Venezia Giulia, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1246, en Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Roma, Roma, Lazio, Italia.
